message:
fix(fabric): bound decision_records to 10k entries to prevent unbounded memory growth

FabricState.decision_records was an unbounded Vec that grew indefinitely
for the lifetime of a Fabric endpoint. Converted to VecDeque with a
10,000-entry circular buffer — oldest records are evicted when the cap
is reached. This prevents OOM in long-running high-throughput scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
